shots.title: Core types + conflict detection engine
shots.notes: SprintClaim, SprintConflict types, checkConflicts() with overlap/adjacent rules. 12 tests.

shots.title: Registry abstraction + file/API backends
shots.notes: SprintRegistry interface, FileRegistry (JSON persistence), ApiRegistry stub. 9 tests.

shots.title: CLI commands: claim, release, status

hazards.description: Sprint resolution needed fallback chain: --sprint flag → config → latest scorecard + 1

shots.notes: 3 new async commands with sprint resolution, registry factory, init scaffolding.

shots.title: Preflight conflict check + claim blocking
shots.notes: Check-before-register pattern, --force override for overlaps, adjacent conflicts informational only. Briefing COURSE STATUS section with grouped claims and conflict display. 11 new tests.

nutrition.description: Clean async patterns, consistent error handling across commands
Registry abstraction enables future backends without CLI changes
Preflight conflict check prevents silent overlaps

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Clean build — the registry abstraction fell into place naturally and conflict detection rules were straightforward
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: ApiRegistry is a stub with no tests — needs a real backend or at minimum test coverage before use
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The briefing integration was the most impactful change — agents seeing claims before planning is more useful than the claim command itself
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: Dogfooding SLOPE on itself from Sprint 3 onward — using briefing, claims, and scoring for real

bunker_locations: Sprint resolution fallback chain (flag → config → scorecard inference) is duplicated in claim.ts and briefing.ts
ApiRegistry has no test coverage — don't switch registry mode to 'api' without adding tests first
yardage_book_updates: Registry factory pattern: createRegistry(config, cwd) returns FileRegistry or ApiRegistry based on config.registry
course_management_notes: Sprint 2 of independent slope repo — 22 files changed, +1172 lines
279 tests (265 core + 14 CLI), 11 test files, 10 new commands/modules
